Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested, not argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Maintaining the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 36(a). No opposition filed.

The trial date of June 13, 2022 is vacated. The new trial date is August 22, 2022 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is September 2, 2022. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.

All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the June 13, 2022 trial date.

Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than July 8, 2022. Responses to the demand are due no later than July 22, 2022. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by August 12, 2022 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, August 18, 2022 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
